name: ASRock B550M PRO SE Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B550 Chipset - Supports DDR4-4733+(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-A - DisplayPort 1.4 - HDMI 2.1 - Dragon 2.5G LAN
shortName: ASRock B550M PRO SE Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B550
description: Micro-ATX B550 motherboard for AMD AM4 with DDR4 and DisplayPort connectivity.
